untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (wedge/converging trend lines) requires trend line identification and geometric analysis that cannot be expressed with the available indicators. The signal relies on visual chart pattern recognition (horizontal tops, down-sloping bottoms, converging boundaries) which is not supported by the allowed technical indicators. Volume surge confirmation exists but core pattern logic is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using pivot levels as proxy for resistance/support zones and volume surge as breakout confirmation, but this does not capture the essential wedge pattern geometry. Author-silent exit conditions replaced with standard reversal logic. This backtest rule should be considered a structural approximation only.
